# Growth Mode

> AI Product Studio for B2B companies that want to build, automate, and grow.

Growth Mode is an AI product studio based in Oxfordshire, UK. Founded by Baz Furby — a commercial operator with 15+ years in SaaS, partnerships, and growth — we design, build, and deploy AI-native products, automation systems, and AI SEO infrastructure for B2B companies across the UK and internationally.

## What We Do

- **SaaS & AI Development** — End-to-end design, development and deployment of AI-native products. From concept to market-ready SaaS, including GTM strategy built in from day one. https://www.growthmode.agency/services/saas-ai-development
- **AI SEO** — AI-first SEO strategies optimised for how search actually works today: structured data entity graphs, server-side rendering, llms.txt, AI crawler accessibility, and always-on automated optimisation. https://www.growthmode.agency/services/ai-seo
- **AI Automation & Training** — Audit where AI creates the most leverage, build the automation to capture it, and train your team to run it. From outreach and lead scoring to ops and content. https://www.growthmode.agency/services/ai-automation-training
- **Fractional AI Consultancy** — Senior AI expertise embedded in your business. Baz Furby works directly with a small number of founders and leadership teams as a fractional AI consultant. https://www.growthmode.agency/services/fractional-ai-consultancy

## Who We Work With

B2B founders and leadership teams in:
- Martech (CRM, analytics, personalisation, content AI)
- Adtech (DSP/SSP, creative AI, measurement)
- Fintech (payments, RegTech, risk AI, lending)

## Verticals

- Martech: marketing intelligence, personalisation engines, attribution platforms, AI-driven content
- Adtech: programmatic infrastructure, bid optimisation, creative automation, cross-channel measurement
- Fintech: compliance automation, risk scoring, payments infrastructure, AI-powered financial products

## Research & Thinking

- The Inevitable Destination: Where AI, Robots, and Deflation Take Us — https://www.growthmode.agency/research/the-inevitable-destination
- SaaS Is Dead. Long Live Agents. — https://www.growthmode.agency/research/saas-is-dead

## About the Founder

Baz Furby is a founder and senior commercial operator with 15 years of SaaS, partnerships, and growth experience. He builds AI products, advises growth-stage businesses, and works hands-on with leadership teams to embed AI into their operations.

LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/bazfurby/

LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/growthmode-agency

## AI Crawler Access

Growth Mode welcomes indexing by AI search agents. All content is server-side rendered and accessible in the initial HTML response. We support responsible AI indexing and citation.

Allowed: GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended, Amazonbot
